title: Liverpool vs Chelsea - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 36
description: Liverpool have lost their last two Premier League games against Chelsea, as many as they had in their previous 20. title: Sunderland vs Manchester United - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 36

title: Manchester City vs Brentford - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 36

title: Nottingham Forest vs Newcastle United - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 36

title: West Ham United vs Arsenal - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 36
description: West Ham have lost 38 Premier League games against Arsenal – they’ve only lost more often against Liverpool, while the Gunners have only beaten Everton more. title: Barcelona vs Real Madrid - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 35
